creator: msl0000023508@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #9)

I never said I has used any custom patch when discovering this bug, the only patch 'attachment 205322' is used to FIX the bug. In fact the 2 kernel images and associated 'ipl.ko' KLD module are downloaded directly from FreeBSD download site, with version 12.0-STABLE r349024 and 13.0-CURRENT r349753.
